title: sarcomphalus havanensis var. havanensis
intro: Sarcomphalus havanensis var. havanensis, also known as Cuban rosewood or Cuban rose, is a species of plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and as a digestive aid. The health benefits of Sarcomphalus havanensis var. havanensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
